calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-06-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Kathy Kollehner.
Stephen Leutza, Esq. for Petitioner: Bobby S. Bridwell, also present, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Robert S. Bridwell.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-22-2005 Reset To Dec-06-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Stephen J. Leutza, Esq. for Petitioner: Bobby S. Bridwell, not present.
Mr. Leutza's requested a continuance in open court, for appearance of the Petitioner is granted.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
Matter is continued to Dec. 6, 2005 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218.
